creator: amdmi3@amdmi3.ru
text:
* pav@FreeBSD.org (pav@FreeBSD.org) wrote:

> State-Changed-From-To: open->feedback
> State-Changed-By: pav
> State-Changed-When: Tue Oct 23 16:51:44 UTC 2007
> State-Changed-Why: 
> Where is that -march=pentium4 coming from? If you have any custom flags in
> make.conf, please unset them and retry.
> 
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=117427

I have CPUTYPE=pentium4
That's pretty much documented in make.conf, so I won't call it custom,
though the ports builds without it.
